title: Peppery Japanese Garlic Stir-fry
description: A quick and easy weeknight dish featuring peppery flavors with lemongrass stalks, perfect for those looking for a gluten-free Japanese meal.
instructions: Roughly chop the lemongrass stalks and set aside.
Season chicken with a pinch of salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chicken, cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add chopped garlic to the pan and stir-fry for another minute until fragrant.
Add lemongrass stalks and green onions to the pan. Stir well with chicken.
Pour in soy sauce and gluten-free soy sauce, reduce heat to low, cover the pan and simmer for about 2-3 minutes until most of the liquid is absorbed.
Stir occasionally and adjust seasoning with more pepper if needed.
Serve hot as a main dish or side.
